overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character with blue hair walking through a neon-lit urban street with overhead orange metallic structures and digital billboards. The camera follows the character as they navigate past pedestrians and a white off-road vehicle in a futuristic commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered futuristic commercial promenade with overhead digital displays

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the street scene from the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: blue-haired character in red skirt walking from right to left across the frame

entered.detail: large orange structural beams forming a covered arcade ceiling
multiple glowing digital screens hanging from the ceiling structure
tall pillar covered with neon signs and advertisements
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
commercial shopfronts with illuminated signage on the left side

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a stationary view of a covered cyberpunk street featuring orange metallic overhead structures and suspended digital billboards. A blue-haired character walks past the camera from right to left while other pedestrians move through the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

events.description: camera begins following the blue-haired character walking forward down the street

agents.ego_description: walking behind the blue-haired character down the covered street

notable_agents.action: white off-road jeep approaching slowly down the street toward the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the blue-haired character walking down the covered promenade. The orange overhead structure dominates the view while a white jeep approaches in the distance. The left-side storefronts pass out of view as the camera moves forward.

events.description: white jeep stops at crosswalk to allow pedestrians to cross
view temporarily blocked by pedestrian with backpack passing close to camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk in front of the waiting jeep

notable_agents.action: white off-road jeep waiting at crosswalk then proceeding forward after pedestrians pass

entered.detail: storefront with large green circular neon signage on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at the zebra crossing as the white jeep waits. The camera view is briefly obscured by another pedestrian passing close by. A neon-lit storefront becomes visible on the right side as the crossing completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite sidewalk with neon storefronts and pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk past various pedestrians

entered.detail: benches and seating areas along the right side of the walkway
illuminated shop windows and commercial displays on the left side

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera continues down the opposite sidewalk. The neon storefront recedes into the distance while pedestrians walk toward the camera. The orange overhead structure continues to line the street as various shop displays pass by on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk promenade that shifts from a stationary observation to a dynamic pursuit of a character. It begins with a fixed view of a covered street under orange metallic structures and digital billboards as a blue-haired character walks past. As the camera begins to follow the character down the promenade, the overhead architecture dominates the frame while a white jeep approaches from the distance. The scene then shifts as the character crosses a zebra crossing, momentarily obscured by a passing pedestrian before a bright neon storefront emerges on the right. Finally, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, moving past various shop displays and oncoming pedestrians while the orange structures continue to line the receding street.
